description_long: This vending machine is styled as a 'Pokemon Center' unit, featuring a large, curved rectangular body with a prominent illuminated sign on top displaying the 'Pokemon Center' logo and Pokeball symbols. The front face is mostly glass, revealing several rows of yellow Pikachu plush toys arranged in a spiral carousel, suggesting a toy or collectible dispenser. The machine is primarily light gray with white accents, and the base is set on a tiled blue and gray floor pattern. There are two digital display panels on the shorter sides, each showing animated or illustrated Pokemon-themed content. The right side of the front face includes a payment interface and possible product selection buttons, while the retrieval slot is likely located below the main display window. The overall design is modern, playful, and highly thematic, making it a visually striking amenity in an urban environment.
description: A modern, Pokemon Center-themed vending machine with a glass front displaying Pikachu plush toys, illuminated signage, and digital display panels on the sides.
description_view_0: The short side of the vending machine, featuring a digital display panel with a Pokemon animation and a Pokeball motif above it.
description_view_1: The main front view, showing the glass display with rows of Pikachu plush toys, the 'Pokemon Center' sign on top, and the payment interface on the right.
description_view_2: The opposite short side, similar to view 0, with a different digital display panel showing a group of Pokemon characters.
description_view_3: A slightly angled front view, highlighting both the glass display of plush toys and the payment interface, as well as the illuminated signage.
attribute_display_panel: Two rectangular digital display panels are visible, one on each short side near the base, each showing animated or illustrated Pokemon content.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front face, featuring a card reader and possible contactless terminal, with a small keypad or button area below.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A small set of individual buttons is visible next to the payment interface on the front, likely for product selection; they are arranged vertically.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular retrieval slot is located at the lower front of the machine, beneath the glass display, with a flap or door for accessing dispensed items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large illuminated 'Pokemon Center' signage with Pokeball logos is mounted on top of the machine, and additional Pokeball motifs are present on the sides and front.
